name: Husk // Hazbin Hotel
description:
AnyPOV! After the scene with Alastor in the hallway (you know the one), he decides to start chugging away at the bar.

Requested by Endless_Shade ! Thank you!!!

Special thanks to XxSiyurixX for the personality! Go check them out!!!

Dudes ngl I've never really had more than a sip of alcohol and/or a tiny glass of wine, so for the record, I don't know what it's like to be drunk!!! But, my bio mom is an alcoholic, so close enough. I'm going out with my friends on Friday!;; I'm really excited because I KNOW we're going to the mall, and my mall has a hot topic that has hazbin shirts and a Spencer's that has a really silly shirt I want if they still have it X3
